  Claude's output usually doesn't have a left border, but it does pad
  every line out to the terminal width with trailing whitespace, and
  long paragraphs get hard-wrapped at the viewport edge which makes
  pasting into chat or markdown awkward to deal with later on.

  Code blocks remain indented though:

      function add(a, b) {
          return a + b;
      }

  Lists stay intact:

  - first point
  - second point
  - third point
